title: BoatJump
description: A small mod that allows you to go up uneven terrain in a boat
body:
Ever got annoyed when transporting villagers in boats? With this mod, you can go uphill on a boat with minimal effort! Simply paddle to a block and the boat will automatically jump similar to other vehicles in Minecraft!
 
![Going up](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/447/652/ezgif-2-b097fb934e-1.gif)

### Features
Boats allow you to travel uphill with minimal effort

### Issues & Feedback
Have an issue with the mod? Got some feedback? Or do you simply want to be updated on my mods? [Join my Discord server!](https://discord.gg/WtdP245E8Q)
